add-brainstorm-stage-recap-and-stop-flow.title: Add Brainstorm Stage Recap And Stop Flow
add-brainstorm-stage-recap-and-stop-flow.description: Add structured brainstorm-stage recap and numbered continue/refine/stop flow, including next-best-action output when the user stops for now.
acceptance_criteria: Brainstorm stage closes with structured recap.
Stop for now saves state and prints next-best action.
Numbered continue/refine/stop stays consistent with the session engine.
verification: Run brainstorm-stage recap coverage.
Verify stop-for-now output after partial progress.

add-cluster-reflection-and-gap-guidance.title: Add Cluster Reflection And Gap Guidance
add-cluster-reflection-and-gap-guidance.description: Reflect back once per 2-4 question cluster and handle gaps with one recommended path plus one or two alternatives.
acceptance_criteria: Reflection happens once per completed cluster.
Gap handling explains the issue and offers one recommended path plus alternatives.
Guidance stays short and opinionated.
verification: Run cluster-reflection coverage.
Verify gap prompts stay within the opinionated option format.

add-guided-session-state-model.title: Add Guided Session State Model
add-guided-session-state-model.description: Add chain-scoped guided session state in .plan/.meta with active stage, cluster progress, linked artifacts, and repo-level last-active support.
acceptance_criteria: Guided sessions are stored per planning chain.
A repo-level last-active pointer can reopen the most recent chain.
Session metadata stays durable across stop/resume cycles.
verification: Run targeted session-state tests.
Verify guided-session metadata writes stay stable across reruns.

add-multi-session-switching-and-coverage.title: Add Multi-Session Switching And Coverage
add-multi-session-switching-and-coverage.description: Add switching between guided planning chains plus coverage for multiple concurrent sessions in one repo.
acceptance_criteria: Users can switch between multiple planning-chain sessions.
Last-active resume remains predictable after switching.
Session coverage protects against cross-chain clobbering.
verification: Run multi-session coverage.
Verify one chain cannot overwrite another chain state.

add-reopen-impact-summary-and-needs-revi.title: Add Reopen Impact Summary And Needs Review Markers
add-reopen-impact-summary-and-needs-revi.description: Add explicit reopen-stage flow that shows impact before mutation and marks downstream stages as needs review.
acceptance_criteria: Reopen flow shows impacted downstream stages before mutation.
Downstream stages are marked needs review after upstream changes.
The user stays in control of whether to reopen.
verification: Run reopen impact-summary coverage.
Verify downstream stages receive needs-review markers.

add-roadmap-parking-writes-and-source-li.title: Add Roadmap Parking Writes And Source Links
add-roadmap-parking-writes-and-source-li.description: When a good idea is valid but too early, let plan suggest parking it in ROADMAP.md with value, reason, unlock, and source link metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Good-but-early ideas can be parked in ROADMAP.md on confirmation.
Parking entries include value, why parked, unlock condition, and source.
Parking suggestions do not derail the active stage.
verification: Run roadmap-parking write coverage.
Verify parked entries preserve source links back to active planning material.

implement-brainstorm-to-epic-handoff.title: Implement Brainstorm To Epic Handoff
implement-brainstorm-to-epic-handoff.description: Carry users from guided brainstorm completion into epic creation with a recap, recommendation, and durable epic write at the checkpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Brainstorm completion can continue directly into epic stage.
Epic write happens at a stable checkpoint after confirmation.
Handoff carries forward shaped context without forcing restatement.
verification: Run brainstorm-to-epic handoff coverage.
Verify epic artifact write only happens at checkpoint confirmation.

implement-downstream-review-checkpoints.title: Implement Downstream Review Checkpoints
implement-downstream-review-checkpoints.description: Before moving forward again after upstream changes, run lightweight downstream review checkpoints in order.
acceptance_criteria: Stale downstream stages require a lightweight review checkpoint.
Review checkpoints stay lightweight rather than blocking behind heavy ceremony.
Users can regain forward flow after review.
verification: Run downstream review-checkpoint coverage.
Verify stale stages are reviewed in order.

implement-epic-to-spec-handoff.title: Implement Epic To Spec Handoff
implement-epic-to-spec-handoff.description: Guide users from shaped epic into spec stage with the same recap and checkpoint pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Epic stage can continue directly into spec stage.
Spec writing occurs at a stable checkpoint after confirmation.
Recap contract stays consistent across stages.
verification: Run epic-to-spec handoff coverage.
Verify checkpoint recap content stays stable.

implement-guided-story-creation-handoff.title: Implement Guided Story Creation Handoff
implement-guided-story-creation-handoff.description: Guide users from approved spec into first story set with execution-ready outputs and next-best-action summaries.
acceptance_criteria: Spec stage can continue directly into story creation.
Story outputs remain execution-ready and verification-aware.
Stop-for-now still prints next-best-action guidance.
verification: Run guided story-creation handoff coverage.
Verify story outputs keep execution-readiness fields intact.

implement-guided-vision-intake.title: Implement Guided Vision Intake
implement-guided-vision-intake.description: Turn brainstorm start into guided vision intake that asks for the user's vision first and then asks whether they have relevant docs, links, or research to provide.
acceptance_criteria: Brainstorm start begins with plain-language vision capture.
plan asks the user for relevant supporting material directly.
The brainstorm note remains the durable artifact for this stage.
verification: Run guided brainstorm start coverage.
Verify supporting-material prompts are user-driven and not auto-scanned.

implement-resume-flow-and-session-menu.title: Implement Resume Flow And Session Menu
implement-resume-flow-and-session-menu.description: Implement guided resume with short summary so far, reopen the active stage, and expose numbered continue/refine/stop choices.
acceptance_criteria: Resume shows a short summary before reopening the stage.
Numbered continue/refine/stop choices are available in the CLI.
Session actions update durable session state cleanly.
verification: Run resume-flow coverage.
Verify numbered menu handling across reruns.
